6ce488898003.name: How to use AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate to implement local caching for AVPlayer and reduce repeated downloads of music files?

acceptedAnswer.text: By customizing the Resource Loader and changing the URL Scheme to a custom cacheable one, AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate intercepts AVPlayer's data requests. It first checks if the corresponding data exists in the local cache; if yes, it returns it directly. If not, it downloads the data in segments via URLSession and saves it locally, achieving simultaneous playback and caching to avoid repeated downloads of music files, saving bandwidth and costs.

6ce488898003.name: How to optimize playback experience by using HTTP Range requests with local cache when AVPlayer requests resources?

acceptedAnswer.text: AVPlayer first sends a GET Range 0-1 request to obtain the total file length and support information, then requests the entire file but cancels the request after receiving enough data and proceeds with segmented subsequent requests. Using this mechanism, a custom Resource Loader can determine and respond with the data ranges available in the local cache and initiate network requests for missing parts, ensuring smooth playback and saving bandwidth.

6ce488898003.name: What are the limitations and considerations when using PINCache as local cache storage for AVPlayer downloaded audio data?

acceptedAnswer.text: PINCache is suitable for small audio files (around 10 MB or less) because it loads data into memory; large files may cause OOM (out-of-memory) issues. Implementation should carefully handle data merging strategies, only merging continuous data ranges to avoid playback anomalies. For large video files, it is recommended to use FileHandle for seeking, reading, and writing to prevent memory overflow.

6ce488898003.name: When AVQueuePlayer switches playback items, how to ensure the previous resource's download requests are properly cancelled?

acceptedAnswer.text: AVQueuePlayer does not automatically cancel download requests of the previous AVURLAsset when switching playback items. Therefore, after receiving the playback item change notification, you need to actively call the cancelLoading() method on the previous AVURLAsset to manually cancel ongoing downloads, avoiding wasted bandwidth and resources.

6ce488898003.name: How to correctly handle data requests and file information requests in ResourceLoaderRequest while ensuring data security?

acceptedAnswer.text: ResourceLoaderRequest distinguishes between contentInformation and dataRequest types, sending HTTP requests with Range headers to the server to obtain file information or audio data respectively. Data can be encrypted or decrypted during retrieval (for example, using CryptoKit's ChaChaPoly), and the decrypted data is stored in the local cache to ensure data security and meet AVPlayer playback requirements.

5033090c18ba.name: How to use iOS WKWebView's built-in HTTP Cache mechanism to improve page load speed?

acceptedAnswer.text: iOS WKWebView automatically caches resources according to the HTTP Cache Header. Developers only need to set the URLRequest's cachePolicy to reloadRevalidatingCacheData, and the system will automatically determine whether the resource has expired and use the cache, effectively improving the speed of the second and subsequent page loads.

5033090c18ba.name: Is it feasible to preload the entire page in WKWebView?

acceptedAnswer.text: Although preloading the entire page can theoretically make subsequent loads faster, in practice it causes excessive network traffic and performance overhead, and users may not even visit that page. Therefore, this method is not recommended.

5033090c18ba.name: How to effectively preload and cache page resources in WKWebView?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can preload key page resources (such as .js, .css, fonts, images) using HTML's <link rel='preload'>, combined with proper HTTP Cache settings, allowing WKWebView to pre-cache these cross-page shared resources. 5033090c18ba.name: Why can't WKWebView use URLProtocol to intercept and cache network requests?

acceptedAnswer.text: WKWebView operates on a separate thread outside the app's main thread, and the system does not handle requests through the app's URL Loading System. Therefore, URLProtocol cannot intercept WKWebView's http/https requests, making it impossible to implement preload caching this way.

5033090c18ba.name: Is WKURLSchemeHandler suitable for implementing resource preloading and caching in WKWebView?

acceptedAnswer.text: WKURLSchemeHandler can only intercept custom non-http/https URL schemes and requires modifying page resource paths and handling CORS issues. Its implementation is complex and maintenance costs are high, with limited overall benefits. It is not recommended for general WKWebView preload caching.

c5e7e580c341.name: How to use the DeviceCheck API to implement one-time discounts or trials and prevent users from repeatedly enjoying them by resetting their phone or changing accounts?

acceptedAnswer.text: DeviceCheck provides 2 bits of cloud storage per device to mark whether the device has already used a discount or trial. c5e7e580c341.name: What are the differences between DeviceCheck API and traditional UUID or IDFV + KeyChain for iOS device identification?

acceptedAnswer.text: Traditional UUID or IDFV + KeyChain reset after switching iCloud accounts or resetting the phone, failing to guarantee device uniqueness; DeviceCheck, however, is managed by Apple's server with 2 bits of cloud flags that can continuously track device status unaffected by account changes, improving identification stability.

c5e7e580c341.name: In what scenarios can the two bits of data from the DeviceCheck API be applied?

acceptedAnswer.text: The two bits can combine into four states, suitable for marking whether a device has tried a service, paid, or is blacklisted, etc. Although the capacity is limited, it is sufficient to implement simple logic such as one-time discounts or trial restrictions.

c5e7e580c341.name: How to securely use the DeviceCheck API to communicate with Apple's servers on the backend?

acceptedAnswer.text: The backend must first obtain the Team ID, Key ID, and privateKey.p8 from the Apple Developer portal, use the ES256 algorithm to create a JWT token, and authorize HTTP requests with a Bearer Token to call Apple's DeviceCheck API query and update endpoints, ensuring the requests are secure and legitimate.

c5e7e580c341.name: Is it possible to complete the DeviceCheck JWT creation and API calls directly within an iOS app?

acceptedAnswer.text: Technically, it is possible to use third-party libraries like CupertinoJWT to generate JWTs and call the DeviceCheck API within the app, but due to private key security risks, it is not recommended for production environments. 46410aaada00.name: How to use mitmproxy to perform man-in-the-middle attacks to sniff HTTPS API data on iOS and MacOS?

acceptedAnswer.text: By installing mitmproxy on MacOS, setting the mobile device's WiFi proxy to point to the Mac's IP and port 8080, and installing the mitmproxy custom certificate on the mobile device, you can intercept and decrypt HTTPS API data transmitted by iOS apps for detailed analysis of request and response contents.

46410aaada00.name: Why can apps still be sniffed by man-in-the-middle attacks even when using HTTPS for transmission?

acceptedAnswer.text: Although HTTPS encrypts transmissions, if an attacker successfully replaces the certificate (via a man-in-the-middle attack), they can decrypt the data content. Therefore, if the app does not implement SSL Pinning or data encryption, the data remains vulnerable to sniffing and forgery.

46410aaada00.name: How can apps prevent mitmproxy and other man-in-the-middle attacks from sniffing API transmission data?

acceptedAnswer.text: Apps can implement SSL Pinning to verify server certificates or perform custom encryption before data transmission to ensure the certificate is not replaced and that intercepted data cannot be read, thereby enhancing API communication security and preventing successful man-in-the-middle sniffing.

46410aaada00.name: What advanced features does mitmproxy offer to help analyze and manipulate API requests?

acceptedAnswer.text: In addition to basic interception, mitmproxy provides mitmdump for exporting logs, the ability to dynamically modify request parameters using Python scripts, support for redirection and traffic filtering, and mitmweb, a Web GUI interface for convenient visual operation and analysis.

46410aaada00.name: What should I do if I encounter connection failures or encrypted responses when sniffing app APIs with mitmproxy?

acceptedAnswer.text: If the app fails to connect due to protection measures like SSL Pinning, or returns content in a custom encrypted format, it indicates the app has basic defenses in place. Further research into certificate bypass or decryption techniques is required; otherwise, it is not possible to directly sniff plaintext data.

a8c2d7ed144b.name: How to enlarge the tap area of a UIButton in iOS to improve user experience?

a8c2d7ed144b.name: Why is it not recommended to use a transparent UIButton overlay to enlarge the tap area?

a8c2d7ed144b.name: How to implement tap area enlargement without changing the UIButton class?

a8c2d7ed144b.name: Why use negative values when setting touchEdgeInsets to enlarge the tap area?

a8c2d7ed144b.name: Besides UIButton, how to enlarge the tap area of a UIImageView?

c4d7c2ce5a8d.name: How to manage version numbers in an iOS APP using semantic versioning rules to avoid dependency confusion?

acceptedAnswer.text: iOS APPs can adopt the semantic versioning format x.y.z, where the major version indicates incompatible changes, the minor version indicates backward-compatible feature additions, and the patch version indicates bug fixes. Ensure version numbers are non-negative integers and incrementing to avoid dependency confusion and facilitate version management.

c4d7c2ce5a8d.name: What is the difference between Version Number and Build Number in an iOS APP, and how to set them correctly?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Version Number is used for App Store and external identification, recommended to follow semantic versioning format and not exceed 18 characters. It must increment and not repeat. The Build Number is used for internal stage identification and upload recognition, which can be a date or an incrementing number. It must not repeat under the same version number. Both should be managed separately to avoid issues during app submission.

c4d7c2ce5a8d.name: How to accurately compare two iOS APP version number strings in Swift?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can use String's numeric compare for simple comparisons, but it may misjudge when formats are inconsistent. It is recommended to standardize on the x.y.z format or implement a custom Version object to parse the string and conform to the Comparable protocol, supporting operators like >, <, =, !=, and ~> to ensure accurate version comparisons.

c4d7c2ce5a8d.name: How to implement complex version number comparisons that comply with semantic versioning and support the Cocoapods-style ~> operator?

acceptedAnswer.text: By creating a custom Version class to parse version strings and operators, implementing the Comparable protocol, and adding the ~> operator defined as greater than or equal to the specified version and less than the next major version increment. This facilitates version range specification and checks similar to Cocoapods.

c4d7c2ce5a8d.name: How to avoid comparison errors caused by inconsistent version number formats and improve the stability of version judgment?

acceptedAnswer.text: Standardize the team's version number format to the complete x.y.z format, avoiding incomplete formats like 1 or 2.0. If inconsistent formats occur, fill in missing parts before comparison. Use regular expressions for parsing and type encapsulation to ensure consistent judgment logic, reducing comparison errors caused by format differences.

5a5c4b25a83d.name: How to resolve test failures caused by unstable API data in End-to-End testing?

5a5c4b25a83d.name: How to switch to using a local Mock Server for End-to-End testing in an iOS app?

5a5c4b25a83d.name: How does MITMProxy implement the Record & Replay functionality for API requests and responses?

5a5c4b25a83d.name: How to handle mismatches in Mock data caused by changing API request parameters (such as timestamps) during testing?

cb00b1977537.name: How to use Codable to distinguish between API fields that are null and those that are missing, to avoid mistakenly updating Core Data?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use a generic enum OptionalValue<T> as the field type, and in a custom init(from:) check whether the container contains the field. cb00b1977537.name: When an API uses 0/1 to represent Bool, how to correctly decode it into a Bool type using Codable?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can try decoding an Int first in a custom init(from:), then convert the value to Bool accordingly, or override decodeIfPresent(Bool.self) via a KeyedDecodingContainer extension so that both 0/1 and true/false decode correctly.

cb00b1977537.name: If I don't want to rewrite init(from:) for every Codable struct, how can I extend JSONDecoder's decoding behavior?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can extend KeyedDecodingContainer's decodeIfPresent method and customize decoding logic for specific types (such as OptionalValue or Bool), achieving module-wide decoding behavior adjustments without repeatedly writing init(from:).

cb00b1977537.name: Why can't Swift Codable use Double Optional to distinguish between null and missing fields?

acceptedAnswer.text: Swift's JSONDecoder uses decodeIfPresent for both Double Optional and Optional fields, so it cannot differentiate between null and missing fields. Therefore, Double Optional cannot be used to implement this distinction.

cb00b1977537.name: Why do I encounter keyNotFound errors when using Property Wrappers to wrap Codable fields?

acceptedAnswer.text: Currently, Swift Codable requires that Property Wrapper fields must exist in the JSON during decoding; otherwise, it throws a keyNotFound error. This prevents graceful handling of missing fields, so be aware of this limitation when using related packages.

2724f02f6e7.name: Why does the built-in NSAttributedString.DocumentType.html perform poorly and crash when parsing HTML?

2724f02f6e7.name: How to solve the low fault tolerance of XMLParser and its inability to parse incomplete or misaligned HTML tags?

2724f02f6e7.name: How to convert HTML into an extensible and easy-to-manipulate NSAttributedString structure?

acceptedAnswer.text: After HTML tokenization, convert the result into an Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) through normalization. Use the Visitor Pattern to map HTML tags to corresponding markup nodes and styles, then assemble a customized NSAttributedString that is easy to extend and supports style inheritance.

2724f02f6e7.name: How to support dynamic CSS styles and customize the NSAttributedString styles corresponding to HTML tags?

acceptedAnswer.text: By defining HTMLTagStyleAttribute and Visitor, parse the style attribute string to dynamically convert CSS styles into MarkupStyle. Provide MarkupStylePolicy to decide whether to prioritize default code styles or HTML style attributes, achieving flexible and extensible style settings.

2724f02f6e7.name: How to correctly display NSAttributedString containing links, images, and complex styles in UITextView or UILabel?

acceptedAnswer.text: Using NSAttributedString generated by ZMarkupParser, UITextView can set linkTextAttributes to control link styles. 948ed34efa09.name: What are the restrictions when adding or modifying passwords using the SecAddSharedWebCredential API?

9659db1357e4.name: How to quickly build a testable API service using Firebase Functions and Firestore?

9659db1357e4.name: How to overcome Firestore's write speed limits for large-scale like counters?

9659db1357e4.name: How to ensure accurate push notification click rate statistics and reduce invalid device interference?

9659db1357e4.name: What are the limitations and suitable scenarios for building APIs with Firebase Functions + Firestore?

e37d66ea1146.name: How to insert multiple images in UITextView with text wrapping support?

acceptedAnswer.text: By using UITextView's attributedText combined with NSTextAttachment, you can insert multiple images at the cursor position. Custom NSTextAttachment subclasses can store image identification IDs to achieve image interleaving and subsequent management.

e37d66ea1146.name: How to solve memory explosion and lag issues caused by inserting multiple images in UITextView?

acceptedAnswer.text: UITextView does not support reuse of NSTextAttachment, which leads to excessive memory usage. The solution is to adopt a TextKit-based extension, such as XLYTextKitExtension, that inserts images as custom UIViews and supports reuse, preventing excessive memory consumption.

e37d66ea1146.name: How to manage image upload failure states and update display in UITextView?

acceptedAnswer.text: By adding a uuid property to a custom NSTextAttachment subclass to tag images, you can traverse attachments in attributedText to find corresponding images. On failure, replace them with an error indicator image or delete them, providing visual feedback and handling for upload failures.

e37d66ea1146.name: How to precisely control image insertion position and support multiple image uploads in UITextView?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use selectedRange to get the cursor position, then insert multiple images at the specified location via NSMutableAttributedString. e37d66ea1146.name: How to convert UITextView input content into a transmittable text format?

acceptedAnswer.text: Traverse all NSTextAttachments in textStorage to extract custom IDs, then combine them into text markers like [[ID]]. Use regular expressions to search and replace, enabling text conversion and transmission of mixed image and text content.

9a9aa892f9a9.name: How to use the Vision framework to automatically detect and crop faces as avatars?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use the Vision framework's VNDetectFaceRectanglesRequest to detect face locations, convert the coordinates to the ImageView size, then crop the image based on the face center point to ensure the face is not cut off, improving the quality of the user's avatar.

9a9aa892f9a9.name: How to fix the issue of incorrect face marking positions caused by UIImageView size not matching the image size?

acceptedAnswer.text: First, adjust the UIImageView size to match the original image size to avoid scaling and blank spaces. Then convert the face boundingBox coordinates detected by Vision to the ImageView coordinate system, ensuring the marking box accurately covers the face position.

9a9aa892f9a9.name: How to convert Vision framework's face detection results into UI coordinates for marking?

acceptedAnswer.text: The boundingBox returned by Vision uses a coordinate system with the origin at the bottom-left corner in normalized coordinates. You need to scale it by the actual ImageView size, then apply vertical flipping and translation to convert it into UIKit's coordinate system with the origin at the top-left corner, so the face marking box displays correctly.

9a9aa892f9a9.name: When detecting multiple faces with Vision, how to avoid cropping errors?

acceptedAnswer.text: When Vision detects multiple faces, avoid automatic cropping. Instead, prompt the user or allow selection of a specific face, since cropping relies on a single face center point. This prevents incorrect cropping areas that could result in incomplete avatars.

9a9aa892f9a9.name: How to use Vision to detect faces on a background thread to avoid UI lag?

acceptedAnswer.text: Call VNImageRequestHandler.perform() on a background thread using DispatchQueue.global().async, then return to the main thread to update the UI after completion. This ensures face detection does not block the main thread, improving app smoothness.

ba5773a7bfea.name: How to use the Visitor Pattern to solve complex logic involving multiple Models and multiple platforms in iOS sharing functionality?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Visitor Pattern allows each Model to accept different Visitors, separating the sharing logic into Visitor classes for each platform. This achieves low coupling and high cohesion, avoiding modifications to existing code when adding new platforms or Models, thereby improving maintainability and scalability.

ba5773a7bfea.name: Why does simply defining sharing data with a Protocol in iOS sharing functionality lead to data requirement confusion?

acceptedAnswer.text: Because different sharing platforms require different data formats and content from the Model, a single Protocol that covers all requirements results in bloated method designs and data pollution, making it hard to maintain and extend. The Visitor Pattern allows implementing different visiting logic for each platform, avoiding this issue.

ba5773a7bfea.name: How to determine if it is suitable to introduce the Visitor Pattern in an iOS project?

acceptedAnswer.text: When a project involves multiple structurally different Models that need to correspond to multiple behaviors (such as sharing to multiple platforms), and these behaviors continue to increase or change, introducing the Visitor Pattern can effectively reduce coupling and increase extensibility. To avoid over-design, the complexity of the requirements should be evaluated.

ba5773a7bfea.name: How does the Visitor Pattern implement double dispatch in Swift to achieve polymorphic behavior?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Swift, Models implement an accept(visitor:) method, and Visitors implement multiple visit(model:) methods. By having the Model call the corresponding visit method on the Visitor, double dispatch is achieved, executing different logic based on both the Model and Visitor types.

ba5773a7bfea.name: How to avoid over-design that makes code hard to read when using the Visitor Pattern?

acceptedAnswer.text: Keep the code simple and prioritize readability. Use the Visitor Pattern only when there are truly multiple behaviors that need separation and extensibility requirements. Avoid using the pattern just for the sake of the pattern, and unify the project architecture to ensure the design meets actual needs without causing excessive fragmentation.

8a04443024e2.name: Why do many iOS apps read the clipboard at startup, and what impact does this have on user privacy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Many iOS apps read the clipboard at startup to implement iOS Deferred Deep Linking, enhancing user experience by automatically displaying the recently viewed web content when the app is opened after download. However, this behavior exposes clipboard contents and may lead to privacy leaks. Users should be aware of whether apps are reasonably accessing the clipboard.

8a04443024e2.name: How does iOS 16 restrict apps from reading the clipboard without active user interaction?

acceptedAnswer.text: iOS 16 introduces restrictions where if an app reads the clipboard without an active user paste action, the system will prompt the user for permission. Without consent, the app cannot access the clipboard, effectively increasing transparency and security regarding clipboard data usage.

8a04443024e2.name: How can developers technically reduce unnecessary clipboard reads and alleviate privacy concerns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Developers can first check if the clipboard content is a URL before reading it, using iOS's new DetectPattern API to accurately identify clipboard formats. They can also display a customized prompt before reading to inform users, thereby reducing unnecessary reads and privacy concerns.

8a04443024e2.name: Are there alternative solutions to avoid using the clipboard for implementing deferred deep linking?

acceptedAnswer.text: Due to iOS restrictions, developers can choose third-party services like Branch.io that use user profiling and matching techniques to implement deep linking, though this requires more backend and database resources. Alternatively, developers can build similar mechanisms themselves to reduce reliance on the clipboard.

8a04443024e2.name: How can users determine if an app's clipboard access is reasonable, and how should they protect their privacy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Users should pay attention to when and how often the system notifies them of an app reading the clipboard. Frequent reads outside of paste actions may pose privacy risks. It is recommended to use trusted apps and regularly update both the system and apps to benefit from the latest privacy protections.

9e43897d99fc.name: Why does the merging behavior of NSAttributedString attributes in iOS 18 and above cause app crashes?

acceptedAnswer.text: In iOS 18 and above, the merging of NSAttributedString attributes references Equatable, causing custom attributes to behave differently during merging. This affects traversal and deletion operations, leading to crashes.

9e43897d99fc.name: How to avoid issues caused by custom attributes not implementing Equatable and Hashable during NSAttributedString attribute merging in iOS 18?

acceptedAnswer.text: Custom NSAttributedString.Key attributes must implement both Equatable and Hashable to ensure that the merging mechanism in iOS 18 can correctly determine equality, preventing merge errors and crashes.

9e43897d99fc.name: What are the underlying changes in the NSAttributedString attribute merging mechanism in iOS 18?

acceptedAnswer.text: Starting from iOS 18, when merging NSAttributedString attributes, the system first checks if the attributes conform to Equatable, then uses a Hashable Set for merge management, which differs from the previous approach that only used Hashable.

9e43897d99fc.name: Why does declaring a custom attribute that only implements Equatable in iOS 18 trigger an Obj-C hash warning?

acceptedAnswer.text: Because the merging mechanism in iOS 18 requires Hashable, implementing only Equatable cannot provide a hash value. This causes performance degradation and warnings when Obj-C calls hash. It is recommended to implement Hashable as well.

9e43897d99fc.name: What impact does the NSAttributedString attribute merging change in iOS 18 have on existing HTML parsing projects?

acceptedAnswer.text: The change in the merging mechanism expands the merging range of custom marker attributes, causing traversal ranges to not match expectations. This can lead to crashes during deletion operations and requires adjusting attribute implementations to ensure stable parsing.

724a7fb9a364.name: What needs are suitable for creating a personal website with Google Site?

4b001d2e8440.name: How to use GitHub Actions to build an iOS App CI/CD pipeline to improve automation efficiency?

4b001d2e8440.name: What should be noted when using self-hosted Runners to run iOS CI/CD?

4b001d2e8440.name: How to manage iOS development certificates and App Store Connect API Keys in GitHub Actions?

4b001d2e8440.name: How to implement Pull Request triggered unit tests and feedback in GitHub Actions?

4b001d2e8440.name: How to design GitHub Actions Workflows to support separate build and deployment, enhancing CI/CD flexibility?

f4b02ee342a4.name: How to use the Builder Pattern to solve the problem of scattered and hard-to-manage WKWebView configuration parameters?

acceptedAnswer.text: By using the Builder Pattern to encapsulate WKWebView configuration parameters in MyWKWebViewConfigurator, settings are applied step-by-step while controlling the injection of WKUserScript and ScriptMessageHandler, achieving centralized management and reuse of parameters, thereby improving maintainability and scalability.

f4b02ee342a4.name: How does using the Chain of Responsibility Pattern improve the complexity of WKWebView navigationAction decision flow?

acceptedAnswer.text: By splitting the multiple navigationAction checks into independent Handlers linked as a responsibility chain, requests are passed sequentially to each Handler for processing, avoiding large conditional statements and enhancing code readability and flexibility in adjusting the processing order.

f4b02ee342a4.name: How to effectively manage multiple WKScriptMessageHandlers in WKWebView using the Strategy Pattern?

acceptedAnswer.text: Define a ScriptMessageStrategy Protocol and have different WKScriptMessageHandlers implement this strategy. Based on the name passed from the front-end JS, messages are automatically dispatched to the corresponding strategy, enabling flexible behavior replacement and clear responsibility division.

f4b02ee342a4.name: How to choose between Strategy Pattern and Chain of Responsibility Pattern in WKWebView scenarios?

acceptedAnswer.text: If the handling strategies do not need to pass control among each other and have clear dispatch criteria, the Strategy Pattern is suitable; if strategies need to be tried sequentially and may be skipped, use the Chain of Responsibility Pattern. In complex scenarios, both can be combined.

f4b02ee342a4.name: How to combine Builder, Chain of Responsibility, and Strategy Patterns to enhance the extensibility and maintainability of WKWebView components?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use the Builder Pattern to unify WKWebView configuration construction, inject the Chain of Responsibility Pattern to manage the navigationAction handling flow, and apply the Strategy Pattern to manage JS message handling strategies. The collaboration of these three improves modularity, flexibility, and maintainability.

6922e90ba90c.name: How to quickly migrate personal notification service from Line Notify to Telegram Bot?

acceptedAnswer.text: By applying for a Telegram Bot, creating a notification group, and obtaining the group's Chat ID, then rewriting the sending code with Google Apps Script, you can complete the migration of notification service from Line Notify to Telegram Bot within 10 minutes, enjoying richer message formats and group management features.

6922e90ba90c.name: What advantages does Telegram Bot have that make it suitable to replace Line Notify?

6922e90ba90c.name: How to implement Telegram Bot notification sending using Google Apps Script?

6922e90ba90c.name: How to set up Telegram Bot and Google Apps Script to achieve command interaction functionality?

6922e90ba90c.name: How to get the Chat ID of a Telegram group for sending notifications?

48a8526c1300.name: How to ensure the Localizable.strings multilingual text file format is correct to avoid discovering errors only after going live?

48a8526c1300.name: How to avoid typos or undeclared keys in multilingual code that cause incorrect keys to display at runtime?

48a8526c1300.name: How to check if there are missing or duplicate keys among multilingual language files?

acceptedAnswer.text: Write Unit Tests to read and parse all .strings files from the Bundle, verifying whether any keys are missing or extra across languages, and detecting duplicate key definitions within the same file. This ensures the completeness and consistency of multilingual content.

48a8526c1300.name: How to automate updating SwiftGen-generated multilingual access code on every Build?

48a8526c1300.name: How to effectively convert a project with extensive use of NSLocalizedString into SwiftGen object access format?

Gradually replace them with SwiftGen object access to ensure the project compiles correctly throughout the conversion process.

99a6cef90190.name: Why are SMS verification codes easily cracked by brute force?

acceptedAnswer.text: SMS verification codes are often 4-digit numeric codes with only 10,000 combinations and no attempt limits. Attackers can quickly try all possibilities using multithreading, allowing them to crack the code in a short time and pose a risk to password reset security.

99a6cef90190.name: How to effectively prevent SMS verification codes from being brute-forced?

acceptedAnswer.text: You should increase the length and complexity of the verification code, limit the number of incorrect attempts, shorten the code's validity period, and combine with multi-factor authentication such as security questions to enhance overall security.

99a6cef90190.name: Why are SMS verification code security vulnerabilities more common on the app side?

acceptedAnswer.text: Apps often simplify the reset process for user convenience and lack error attempt limits or CAPTCHAs. If the API is not well protected, attackers can easily obtain SMS verification codes through sniffing and brute force attacks.

99a6cef90190.name: How to simulate SMS verification code brute force cracking using a Python script?

acceptedAnswer.text: By using multithreading to try all 4-digit numeric combinations in segments, sending POST requests to the verification API, and parsing responses to determine success, you can quickly find the correct verification code.

99a6cef90190.name: Besides verification code strength, what other measures can improve the security of the password recovery process?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can add SSL pinning and encrypt transmission to prevent sniffing, include CAPTCHAs, limit device attempt counts, and adopt multi-factor authentication to reduce the risk of account theft.

2981dc0fcd58.name: How to use NSTextList to achieve multi-level nested list indentation in iOS NSAttributedString?

acceptedAnswer.text: By adding multiple NSTextList objects sequentially to the textLists property of NSMutableParagraphStyle to define different levels, using marker(forItemNumber:) to generate bullet points, and separating list items with newline and tab characters, you can achieve multi-level nested list indentation.

2981dc0fcd58.name: Why can't NSTextList customize bullet spacing and add numeric suffixes when implementing list indentation?

acceptedAnswer.text: NSTextList's public API restricts the format and spacing of bullet points, preventing adjustments to left and right spacing or automatic addition of suffixes like "." for numeric items. 2981dc0fcd58.name: How to perfectly control list indentation and line alignment using NSTextTab with NSParagraphStyle?

2981dc0fcd58.name: When implementing list indentation with NSTextTab, how to calculate bullet and indentation positions?

acceptedAnswer.text: Calculate the width of the bullet string using UIFont, then add custom preIndent and sufIndent as headIndent and NSTextTab positions to ensure that wrapped text aligns with the bullet. Adjust indentation distance recursively according to the level.

2981dc0fcd58.name: Why choose NSTextTab instead of NSTextList to implement list indentation in iOS NSAttributedString?

acceptedAnswer.text: Although NSTextList can quickly implement nested lists, it cannot customize spacing and bullet formats, resulting in poor layout. NSTextTab allows precise control of tab positions and indentation, combined with custom symbols and font width calculation, achieving perfect multi-level list indentation and line alignment.

8d863bcd1c55.name: How to leverage iOS app development experience to enhance career growth?

fd7f92d52baa.name: How to correctly detect push notification permission status and update it in real-time on iOS 9 to iOS 12?

fd7f92d52baa.name: How to determine if an iOS 9 user has ever been asked for push notification permission?

acceptedAnswer.text: Since iOS 9 cannot directly determine whether the user has been asked for permission, you need to customize a UserDefaults flag (e.g., iOS9NotificationIsDetermined) to record whether the user has responded to the push notification permission prompt, and set this flag in the didRegisterUserNotificationSettings callback to distinguish between not asked and denied states.

fd7f92d52baa.name: In the push notification permission flow from iOS 9 to iOS 12, how to safely redirect users to the system settings page to guide them to enable notifications?

acceptedAnswer.text: You should use UIApplication.shared.open(URL(string: UIApplicationOpenSettingsURLString)!) to open the system settings page, avoiding private APIs like App-Prefs:root= to prevent App Store rejection, ensuring users are guided safely and compliantly to enable notification permissions.

fd7f92d52baa.name: How to use the Observable mechanism to dynamically listen and respond to push notification permission status changes?

acceptedAnswer.text: Set notificationStatus as an Observable object, and subscribe to its afterChange event on pages that need to listen (such as in viewDidLoad). Dynamically perform corresponding actions based on authorized, denied, or undetermined states, while paying attention to memory management to avoid listener invalidation or leaks.

fd7f92d52baa.name: How to implement a push notification permission request flow that works across iOS 9 to iOS 12?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use UNUserNotificationCenter.requestAuthorization for iOS 10 and above to request permission, and for iOS 9 and below, call application.registerUserNotificationSettings and handle the result in the didRegisterUserNotificationSettings callback. Combine this with permission status checks and Observable updates to achieve a complete cross-version permission request flow.

309d0302877b.name: How to use iOS Shortcuts to automatically forward specific text messages to family members to prevent elders or children from receiving scam messages?

acceptedAnswer.text: Set up automation conditions in Shortcuts to automatically forward message content containing keywords (such as http, verification codes, etc.) to designated family members via Line. This works even if the phone is locked, effectively assisting with verification remotely and preventing scams.

309d0302877b.name: How to use iOS Shortcuts to automatically create package delivery reminders to avoid forgetting to pick up parcels from convenience stores?

acceptedAnswer.text: Configure Shortcut automation to detect keywords in text messages (such as "delivered", "arrived"), automatically add reminders, and set reminder times. This converts package delivery messages into to-do reminders, improving life efficiency without manual input.

309d0302877b.name: How does iOS Shortcuts automatically create payment reminders from credit card statement emails?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use the Apple Mail app with Shortcut automation to filter emails with titles containing "credit card statement", automatically add reminders, and set reminder times to avoid missing payment deadlines and enhance financial management efficiency.

309d0302877b.name: What are the limitations when using iOS Shortcuts automation to forward text messages or create reminders?

acceptedAnswer.text: Currently, Shortcut automation can only create multiple automations for specific keywords separately and cannot handle multiple keywords at once. It requires setting conditions for sender or message content and cannot forward all messages comprehensively. Batch email fetching may trigger multiple emails simultaneously, requiring additional filtering.

309d0302877b.name: How to fix the issue where tapping Done after setting up iOS Shortcut automation has no response?

acceptedAnswer.text: This is a known iOS bug. If tapping Done has no response, you can directly return to the Shortcuts home page. The settings will still take effect without needing to redo the operation.

78507a8de6a5.name: How to use Singleton, Flyweight, and Factory Pattern to avoid resource waste from multiple Socket.IO connections?

acceptedAnswer.text: When multiple pages or objects request connections to the same path, use Singleton to manage a unique ConnectionManager, Flyweight to share Connection objects with the same URL, and Factory Pattern to abstract connection creation. This effectively reduces memory overhead and duplicate connection time, improving system performance and scalability.

78507a8de6a5.name: How to implement caching and retransmission when iOS Socket.IO Swift Client does not support offline event sending?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use the Command Pattern to encapsulate sending events into command objects. When the connection is lost, add commands to a cache queue, and execute cached commands sequentially after the connection is restored. This achieves consistent offline sending functionality across platforms and enhances code readability and maintainability.

78507a8de6a5.name: How to manage multiple states and operation restrictions of Socket.IO connections using Finite State Machine and State Pattern?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use a Finite State Machine to define orderly state transition rules for connections, combined with the State Pattern to encapsulate behaviors of different states within their respective state classes. This avoids complex conditional checks, ensures only valid operations are allowed in each state, and improves code clarity and maintainability.

78507a8de6a5.name: How to implement flexible connection state management in ConnectionKeeper using Chain of Responsibility Pattern?

acceptedAnswer.text: Divide connection state management into multiple handling nodes, each responsible for judging and executing operations for specific states (such as reconnection or releasing connections). Use the Chain of Responsibility pattern to link these nodes, ensuring that nodes meeting conditions handle independently, enhancing logical flexibility and ease of testing.

78507a8de6a5.name: How to use Builder Pattern to create configurable, reusable, and must-be-initialized Socket.IO Connections?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use the Builder Pattern to set connection parameters and configurations step-by-step, ensuring that Connection objects must be initialized via connect() before use. This prevents errors from uninitialized calls, facilitates extension and reuse of the construction process, and improves development safety and flexibility.

9a05f632eba0.name: How does iOS use privacy principles and technologies to protect user data from misuse?

acceptedAnswer.text: iOS adopts four major privacy principles: Data Minimization, On-Device Processing, User Transparency and Control, and Security. Combined with Private Relay to obscure IP addresses, restrictions on third-party cookies, and mandatory app declarations of privacy usage reasons and tracking domains, it ensures user data is processed locally and transparently controlled, effectively reducing the risk of data misuse.

9a05f632eba0.name: How does iOS 17 enhance protection of URL tracking parameters?

acceptedAnswer.text: iOS 17 Safari automatically removes common tracking parameters such as fbclid and gclid, retaining only utm_ series parameters. This mechanism blocks third parties from tracking user behavior through URL parameters, improving browsing privacy. Developers can test the strictness of this feature using the DuckDuckGo browser.

9a05f632eba0.name: How can app developers comply with new iOS privacy regulations to avoid rejection from the App Store?

acceptedAnswer.text: Developers must explicitly declare the privacy-related APIs and tracking domains they use in the Privacy Manifest, and can only initiate tracking requests after obtaining user consent; otherwise, the system will block them. Additionally, they must comply with the IDFA user authorization mechanism to ensure compliance and pass App Store review.

9a05f632eba0.name: How does iOS replace traditional cross-app and cross-site tracking technologies?

acceptedAnswer.text: Since third-party cookies are blocked, Device UUIDs are inaccessible, and Private Relay obscures IP addresses, iOS currently allows only limited tracking methods, such as using the clipboard (Pasteboard) with user authorization. It also provides privacy-protecting advertising measurement solutions like Private Click Measurement and SKAdNetwork.

9a05f632eba0.name: How can iOS's Hide My Email and third-party sign-in features enhance user privacy and security?

acceptedAnswer.text: iOS requires apps supporting third-party sign-in to implement Sign in with Apple, allowing users to hide their real email addresses by using Apple-generated virtual mailboxes, which can be deleted at any time. This prevents personal data leaks, strengthens privacy control, and enhances cross-platform data security.

ee47f8f1e2d2.name: How to implement AVPlayer streaming and caching simultaneously using AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate?

ee47f8f1e2d2.name: What are common challenges and solutions when implementing local caching for AVPlayer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Common challenges include the complexity of intercepting resource requests and synchronizing cached data. ee47f8f1e2d2.name: Why is it necessary to review and update the implementation of AVPlayer streaming and caching?

a5643de271e4.name: How to use ZMarkupParser to support text styles specified from HTML style attributes?

acceptedAnswer.text: ZMarkupParser natively parses various style attributes (such as color, font-size, font-weight) and allows custom extension of parsing logic, enabling style attributes in HTML to be directly converted into corresponding NSAttributedString styles.

70aeddb1fd9b.name: How to quickly create a free personal link page with GitHub Pages and support custom domains?

ddd88a84e177.name: How to parse embedded Gist source code in Medium articles and convert it into Markdown code blocks?

ddd88a84e177.name: How to handle complex text styles and overlapping marks in Medium articles and correctly convert them to Markdown?

f644db1bb8bf.name: How to use the notification settings shortcut provided by iOS 12 and above to enhance user experience?

f644db1bb8bf.name: What are the key steps to implement the iOS notification settings page shortcut?

Then, have the AppDelegate conform to UNUserNotificationCenterDelegate and implement the userNotificationCenter(_:openSettingsFor:) method. f644db1bb8bf.name: Why allow users to jump from the system notification settings page to the app's notification settings?

acceptedAnswer.text: Directly turning off notifications from the system disables all notifications from the developer, causing users to potentially miss important messages. By adding an in-app notification settings shortcut, users can fine-tune notification types, achieving the best balance in communication between both parties, reducing disturbances while not missing critical information.

f644db1bb8bf.name: How to provide a settings shortcut using 3D Touch when receiving a notification?

f644db1bb8bf.name: What practical benefits does this feature bring to push notification strategies?

12c5026da33d.name: When is the apple-app-site-association for Universal Links on iOS 14 and above updated?

12c5026da33d.name: How to configure reverse exclusion and multiple appIDs in Universal Links matching rules?

14cee137c565.name: How to implement a custom pull-down dismissal animation with gesture interaction in iOS UIViewController?

14cee137c565.name: How to disable the pull-down dismissal feature and prompt user confirmation in card-style presentations on iOS 13 and above?

acceptedAnswer.text: Set the UIViewController's isModalInPresentation property to true, or implement UIAdaptivePresentationControllerDelegate's presentationControllerShouldDismiss to return false, and show a prompt in presentationControllerDidAttemptToDismiss to prevent accidental dismissal when there is unsaved data.

14cee137c565.name: How to implement full-screen right-swipe back with custom animation and gesture interaction?

14cee137c565.name: How to implement custom transition animations in UIViewController and avoid the screen freezing when the animation completes?

acceptedAnswer.text: Implement the UIViewControllerAnimatedTransitioning protocol and use UIView.animate to complete the animation inside the animateTransition method. 14cee137c565.name: How to avoid conflicts between UIScrollView and pull-down dismissal gestures to ensure smooth gesture interaction?

cb0c68c33994.name: How to monitor iOS app reviews using the App Store Connect API and get real-time notifications on Slack?

cb0c68c33994.name: How to overcome the challenge of two-factor authentication in App Store Connect when automating review fetching?

cb0c68c33994.name: How to prevent a Slack Bot from repeatedly pushing already read app reviews?

cb0c68c33994.name: What are the security and maintenance recommendations for self-hosting an app review monitoring Slack Bot?

1e85b8df2348.name: How to use Google Apps Script to automatically fetch website data from GA4 and send it to Telegram?

1e85b8df2348.name: How to set up Google Apps Script to automatically run GA4 data queries and Telegram notifications on a schedule?

1e85b8df2348.name: How to customize GA4 query metrics and dimensions to meet different data needs?

1e85b8df2348.name: What to do when Telegram Bot fails to send messages or hits rate limits?

b08ef940c196.name: How to implement Deferred Deep Link on iOS to preserve pre-installation redirect information?

acceptedAnswer.text: By using JavaScript on the web to write redirect information into the clipboard, and reading the clipboard data when the app launches, combined with parsing parameters via URL Scheme, the app can automatically redirect to the target page after installation, achieving Deferred Deep Link functionality.

b08ef940c196.name: How does iOS 9 support Deferred Deep Link?

acceptedAnswer.text: Since iOS 9 does not support automatic clipboard writing, it requires using the cookie sharing mechanism between Safari and the app. The app loads a specific webpage in a hidden background SFSafariViewController to read the cookie, then triggers a redirect via URL Scheme to achieve Deferred Deep Link.

b08ef940c196.name: What are the clipboard access restrictions on iOS 16 and above?

acceptedAnswer.text: Starting from iOS 16, when an app actively reads the clipboard, a system prompt appears asking for user consent. The app must obtain the user's permission to access clipboard content, which affects the process of using the clipboard to pass data for Deferred Deep Link.

b08ef940c196.name: Why can't pure Deep Link preserve redirect information after app installation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pure Deep Link can only determine whether the app is installed. If not installed, it redirects to the App Store. After installation, opening the app cannot retrieve the original redirect parameters, resulting in failure to automatically navigate to the target page. Deferred Deep Link must be implemented additionally.

b08ef940c196.name: How to prevent SFSafariViewController from not loading when launched in the background?

acceptedAnswer.text: On iOS 10 and above, setting SFSafariViewController to transparent or hidden causes it not to load. The solution is to place a visible UIView above the main UIViewController that does not affect the user, and add the SFSafariViewController to that UIView to ensure it loads properly and reads cookies.

7498e1ff93ce.name: How to successfully extract and dump the ipa file of an iOS App using a jailbroken phone and tools?

acceptedAnswer.text: By installing Open SSH and Frida on a jailbroken phone, and configuring Python and frida-ios-dump on a Mac, you can establish a connection using iproxy and run the dump.py tool to dynamically dump the app and export a usable ipa file, enabling subsequent analysis and decompilation.

7498e1ff93ce.name: How to use Lookin or Reveal tools to view and dynamically modify the UI layout structure of an iOS App?

7498e1ff93ce.name: Why can data still be stolen even if the app uses HTTPS transmission and encryption?

acceptedAnswer.text: Because reverse engineering can analyze the app's internal encryption and decryption logic using jailbroken devices, intercepting plaintext data or keys directly from the app side. Even with transport layer encryption, data theft cannot be completely prevented. Security depends on the time cost and technical difficulty of cracking.

7498e1ff93ce.name: How to obtain Objective-C header files of an iOS App for business logic analysis using the class-dump tool?

This exports complete .h header files, allowing developers to analyze Objective-C classes and method structures. It is not suitable for Swift projects.

7498e1ff93ce.name: What common tools assist in dynamic analysis and injection for iOS reverse engineering?

acceptedAnswer.text: Common tools include Cycript for dynamic injection and debugging on jailbroken phones, frida-ios-dump for dynamic dumping, Lookin and Reveal for UI layout analysis, MonkeyDev for injection, modification, and repackaging of apps, and Keychain-Dumper for attempting to export Keychain contents. Combining these tools effectively supports the reverse engineering process.

142244e5f07a.name: How to prevent password reset tokens from being predicted and causing account hijacking?

acceptedAnswer.text: Avoid using predictable serial numbers as password reset tokens. Instead, use random and unique identification tokens and strictly validate them on the backend to prevent attackers from guessing tokens to reset others' passwords.

142244e5f07a.name: What security risks arise from abusing website encryption and decryption functions?

acceptedAnswer.text: If a website uses the same key for all encryption and decryption and exposes arbitrary encryption/decryption interfaces, the key can be compromised. Attackers can exploit this vulnerability to bypass authentication mechanisms, leading to data leaks and account intrusions.

142244e5f07a.name: What problems occur if the backend does not re-validate user input?

acceptedAnswer.text: If validation relies only on the frontend and the backend does not verify format or permissions, attackers can bypass restrictions and submit malicious data, resulting in account data being altered or password reset processes being abused.

142244e5f07a.name: How does the lack of two-factor authentication and device binding affect account security?

acceptedAnswer.text: Without two-factor authentication and device binding, once attackers obtain a password, they can log in directly without being blocked, greatly increasing the risk of account hijacking.

142244e5f07a.name: What security vulnerabilities are caused by exposing user email information?

acceptedAnswer.text: Exposing email information allows attackers to easily identify target accounts. Combined with design flaws like predictable tokens, they can easily launch password reset attacks, seriously compromising account security.

ac557047d206.name: How to implement offline phone number caller identification in an iOS app?

acceptedAnswer.text: Create a local phone identification database through Call Directory Extension by mapping phone numbers to names stored as JSON. The Extension reads and writes this data into the system to achieve offline real-time caller ID, improving user call answering decisions.

ac557047d206.name: How to ensure users have enabled iOS call blocking and identification features?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use CXCallDirectoryManager's getEnabledStatusForExtension method to check the Extension's enabled status, and guide users to manually enable it in Settings > Phone > Call Blocking & Identification to ensure the caller ID functionality works properly.

ac557047d206.name: How to maintain and update the local caller ID database to support a large number of phone numbers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Store phone numbers and labels as a dictionary in a JSON file within the App Group directory shared across Extensions, and use CXCallDirectoryManager.reloadExtension to actively notify the Extension to reload data, ensuring database updates and expansions do not affect performance.

ac557047d206.name: What are the phone number format requirements for caller identification in iOS?

acceptedAnswer.text: Phone numbers must be pure numeric strings. For Taiwan numbers, replace the leading 0 with 886. Landline extensions should be appended directly after the number without symbols. This format allows Call Directory Extension to correctly identify and label calls.

ac557047d206.name: Why does Call Directory Extension not support real-time API queries for incoming phone numbers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Call Directory Extension only allows offline database-based phone identification and cannot call APIs in real-time during incoming calls. Number mappings must be prepared in advance and written locally to avoid impacting system performance and privacy security.

6012b7b4f612.name: Why does the tintColor of Image Assets on the page become ineffective when presenting a UIAlertController?

acceptedAnswer.text: Because the system automatically sets the tintAdjustmentMode of the page's Root ViewController to Dimmed, causing the tintColor to appear gray. This is a system mechanism, not an error.

6012b7b4f612.name: How to keep the tintColor of Image Assets unchanged by the system when presenting a UIAlertController?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can force the tintAdjustmentMode to normal in the UIView's tintColorDidChange method to ensure the tintColor is always displayed with normal saturation.

6012b7b4f612.name: What are the tintAdjustmentMode options and what do they mean?

acceptedAnswer.text: tintAdjustmentMode has three modes: Automatic (inherits the parent view's setting), Normal (displays tintColor normally), and Dimmed (displays a desaturated gray color).

6012b7b4f612.name: Which UIKit components' display effects are affected by changing tintAdjustmentMode?

acceptedAnswer.text: Changing tintAdjustmentMode affects the tintColor display of Image Assets rendered in template mode within the entire UIView and its subviews.

6012b7b4f612.name: Why does understanding tintAdjustmentMode help solve UI color anomalies in iOS development?

acceptedAnswer.text: Because the system automatically adjusts tintAdjustmentMode when presenting windows like UIAlertController, understanding this mechanism helps prevent tintColor display issues and improves UI consistency.

a4bc3bce7513.name: How to securely and stably obtain a device unique identifier (UUID) on iOS?

acceptedAnswer.text: Using IDFV (Identifier For Vendor) combined with Key-Chain access to store the UUID can prevent changes caused by deleting and reinstalling the app, ensuring stable device identification that is not affected by system restrictions.

a4bc3bce7513.name: Why can't MAC Address or traditional UUID be used to identify iOS devices anymore?

acceptedAnswer.text: Apple prohibits the use of MAC Address and traditional UUID as device identifiers because these methods may infringe on user privacy and be abused, leading to API restrictions and blocking. It is necessary to switch to Apple-recommended alternatives such as IDFV.

a4bc3bce7513.name: What happens when all apps from the same vendor are deleted while using IDFV?

a4bc3bce7513.name: How to implement persistent UUID storage and access through Key-Chain?

d796bf8e661e.name: How to implement simultaneous playback and caching of HLS streams using AVPlayer on iOS?

acceptedAnswer.text: AVPlayer itself cannot intercept the download requests for .ts files, so it is not possible to directly use AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate or URLProtocol to achieve simultaneous playback and caching. The most practical solution is to create a local Reverse Proxy Server within the app to intercept requests and cache them. However, this approach faces limitations when the app runs in the background, as the system may suspend it, requiring additional mechanisms to maintain the connection.

d796bf8e661e.name: Why can't AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate intercept the download of .ts files in HLS streams?

acceptedAnswer.text: AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate only supports intercepting resource requests with custom schemes, but the .ts file downloads in HLS are initiated directly by AVFoundation internally using HTTP/HTTPS. Therefore, it cannot be intercepted through the delegate, making caching impossible at this stage.

d796bf8e661e.name: Why can't URLProtocol successfully cache AVPlayer HLS requests?

acceptedAnswer.text: AVPlayer does not use the standard URL Loading System for HLS requests, causing URLProtocol to fail in intercepting the actual .m3u8 and .ts requests. Additionally, attempting to use a custom scheme results in a CoreMediaErrorDomain 12881 error, preventing successful replacement and caching of the data.

d796bf8e661e.name: What are the limitations of using a local Reverse Proxy Server to cache HLS streams?

acceptedAnswer.text: Although a local HTTP Server solution can intercept .m3u8 and .ts requests to enable caching, when the app enters the background, the system may suspend or terminate the local server connection. It is necessary to use techniques such as continuously sending requests to keep the server running; otherwise, playback experience will be affected.

d796bf8e661e.name: Are there other feasible solutions to implement iOS HLS stream caching?

acceptedAnswer.text: Besides a local Reverse Proxy, other options include fully downloading before playback (offline playback), implementing a custom player, or converting to mp3/mp4 formats. However, these approaches are technically challenging and complex. Moreover, AVFoundation's built-in HTTP Client Cache does not work for HLS, so in practice, local proxy combined with caching is the main approach.

62f68ebeecd3.name: How to choose between Timer and DispatchSourceTimer in iOS development to meet different task requirements?

62f68ebeecd3.name: How to prevent Timer from being delayed during UI interactions due to RunLoop Mode switching?

62f68ebeecd3.name: Why can improper use of DispatchSourceTimer cause crashes, and how to safely manage its state?

acceptedAnswer.text: DispatchSourceTimer is extremely sensitive to the call order of suspend, resume, and cancel. Incorrect operations like repeated suspend or canceling while suspended can cause crashes. Encapsulating its state transitions with a finite state machine and executing operations on a serial queue can effectively prevent crashes caused by incorrect call sequences.

62f68ebeecd3.name: How to use a finite state machine and serial queue to ensure safe DispatchSourceTimer operations in multithreaded environments?

acceptedAnswer.text: Encapsulate the state management of DispatchSourceTimer as a finite state machine and use a dedicated serial queue to execute state transitions and operations sequentially. This avoids race conditions and crashes caused by simultaneous calls from multiple threads, ensuring safe state changes that comply with DispatchSourceTimer usage rules.

62f68ebeecd3.name: How to improve DispatchSourceTimer's testability and flexibility through design patterns?

acceptedAnswer.text: Encapsulate DispatchSourceTimer using the Adapter Pattern and create Timer instances via the Factory Pattern, allowing Timer behavior to be abstracted and replaced with mocks during testing; simultaneously, use the Strategy Pattern to encapsulate DispatchSourceHandler's work content, enabling dynamic task logic switching and enhancing modularity and testing flexibility.

acceptedAnswer.text: The Passphrase is used to encrypt certificates and profiles in the Fastlane Match Repo. It is a key string that protects sensitive data. It is recommended to use a random string and keep it properly. Team members and CI/CD use this Passphrase to decrypt and pull certificates, ensuring certificate security and preventing unauthorized access.

aid8f7e6a5c4.name: How to quickly complete the application for the Citizen Digital Certificate to enhance online financial service experience?

acceptedAnswer.text: Applicants aged 18 or older with Taiwanese residency can first fill out the application form online to make an appointment, then bring their ID card and a 250 NTD processing fee to any household registration office for in-person processing. This allows you to quickly obtain the Citizen Digital Certificate and immediately enjoy secure and convenient online banking and government services.

aid8f7e6a5c4.name: How does the Citizen Digital Certificate ensure the security of online transactions and identity verification?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Citizen Digital Certificate combines an IC chip with a PIN code setup to guarantee identity recognition and data transmission security, effectively preventing identity theft and data leakage during services such as online tax filing and internet banking.

aid8f7e6a5c4.name: How should the Citizen Digital Certificate be used with devices to successfully complete identity verification?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can use an IC card reader connected to a computer with the necessary drivers installed, or use your phone’s NFC function to directly read the Citizen Digital Certificate card. Follow the system prompts to enter your PIN code and quickly complete identity verification, avoiding complicated steps.

aid8f7e6a5c4.name: What should I do if the NFC sensing of the Citizen Digital Certificate on my phone is poor?

acceptedAnswer.text: Try slowly moving or adjusting the angle of the Citizen Digital Certificate card near your phone’s NFC sensing area. On iPhone, the NFC sensing area is at the top; on Android devices, the location varies by model. Repeated attempts can improve the sensing success rate.

aid8f7e6a5c4.name: What common online government and financial services can the Citizen Digital Certificate be used for?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Citizen Digital Certificate can be used for online tax filing, checking labor and health insurance information, applying for electronic household registration transcripts, opening online bank and securities accounts, checking personal credit reports, and participating in referendum petitions, comprehensively enhancing digital service efficiency.

cdc.name: How to avoid forgetting the PIN or getting the card locked when using the Citizen Digital Certificate?

acceptedAnswer.text: The PIN of the Citizen Digital Certificate is the unlock password for the card. It is recommended to change the default PIN immediately after applying, and be careful when entering it to avoid multiple errors that cause the card to be locked. If you forget the PIN, you should unlock or reset it through the official MOICA designated process to avoid causing greater inconvenience by trying randomly.

cdc.name: What are the differences between the mobile Citizen Digital Certificate and the physical Citizen Digital Certificate, and how should I choose?

acceptedAnswer.text: The mobile Citizen Digital Certificate is bound within a mobile app and uses biometric authentication, eliminating the need to carry a card reader and making it convenient to use. It is suitable for those who frequently use their phones for government or financial verification. The physical card requires a card reader or NFC support on the phone, and is suitable for those accustomed to computer operations or unable to use biometric devices.

cdc.name: How to properly use phone NFC to read the Citizen Digital Certificate card?

acceptedAnswer.text: To use phone NFC to read the Citizen Digital Certificate, the phone, service side, and card version must all support it. When sensing, it is recommended to place the card flat against the back of the phone. For iPhone, slowly move from near the camera to find the sensing point; for Android, depending on the brand, it is often near the upper middle or center on the back. Move slowly and hold until verification is complete to avoid failure caused by quick scanning.

cdc.name: What documents and fees are required when applying for the Citizen Digital Certificate?

acceptedAnswer.text: To apply for the Citizen Digital Certificate, you must be at least 18 years old and have household registration. You need to personally bring your original ID card, cash for the processing fee (about 250 NTD for the physical card, about 30 NTD for the mobile certificate), and provide an email and mobile phone number for receiving notifications. After filling out the form online, you must complete card collection and setup at the household registration office within 7 days.

cdc.name: Where can the Citizen Digital Certificate be used, and how does it enhance the security of financial operations?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Citizen Digital Certificate is widely used for government online tax filing, MyData personal data authorization, household registration applications, and various financial operations such as increasing transfer limits, setting designated accounts, and signing contracts online. Through strong identity authentication and digital signatures, it effectively reduces the risk of financial fraud and accelerates process security.

atami.name: What is the most effortless transportation strategy to travel from Tokyo to Atami for the fireworks festival and return smoothly?

acceptedAnswer.text: Taking the Shinkansen from Tokyo directly to Atami takes about 45 minutes. It is recommended to purchase return tickets in advance and allow a 20-30 minute buffer after the event to avoid queues and crowds. If traveling with elderly or carrying a lot of luggage, consider booking a private car for more convenience and comfort.

atami.name: It's my first time attending the Atami Fireworks Festival; where is the ideal viewing spot and how to secure a good position?

acceptedAnswer.text: The top choice is Atami Sun Beach, which offers a wide-open view and great angles for photography. It is recommended to arrive between 5:30 PM and 6:30 PM to lay out a picnic mat and secure your spot. During peak seasons or holidays, arrive even earlier. To avoid the crowd when leaving, choose a spot toward the back of the beach near Tokai Coast Town for a quicker exit.

atami.name: How to plan a same-day round trip to Atami for the fireworks to balance comfort and efficiency?

acceptedAnswer.text: In the afternoon, walk through the shopping street to stock up on food and drinks. Secure your spot on the beach before 6 PM. The fireworks last about 20 minutes. Allow 20-25 minutes for walking and queuing after the event. It is advisable to buy return tickets in advance and keep backup train options to ensure a smooth and stress-free journey back.

atami.name: What is the most practical dining arrangement on the day of the Atami fireworks to avoid queues?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is recommended to purchase dinner and drinks beforehand at the shopping street near the station or convenience stores, then enjoy a picnic on the beach. This avoids long lines at popular restaurants, saving time and allowing you to relax and enjoy the fireworks.

atami.name: If I want to turn the Atami fireworks into a vacation experience, how should I choose accommodation and booking strategies?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is recommended to stay overnight at an onsen ryokan or a seaside hotel. Prioritize rooms on higher floors facing the sea to enjoy fireworks viewing from your room. Book early and choose cancellable options to avoid dining rush on the fireworks night, enhancing overall comfort and experience.

sanin.name: How to efficiently connect Hiroshima, Okayama, and San'in attractions using transportation strategies?

acceptedAnswer.text: Using Okayama as the entry and transfer base, travel between Hiroshima and Okayama via the Sanyo Shinkansen, then take the cross-mountain limited express or highway bus north to San'in. This maximizes time efficiency and links the scenic and cultural areas of both the Seto Inland Sea and the Sea of Japan sides.

sanin.name: How to plan a hassle-free Hiroshima Miyajima trip that allows experiencing tidal changes?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is recommended to take the JR from Hiroshima city to Miyajimaguchi, then transfer to the ferry to the island. Plan a half-day to full-day itinerary based on the tide schedule: admire the floating torii gate at high tide, walk close to the gate for photos at low tide, and take the ropeway up to Shishiiwa Observatory to overlook the Seto Inland Sea islands, enjoying the complete sacred aesthetic.

sanin.name: What must-visit spots in Okayama are suitable as cultural refreshment before the San'in itinerary?

acceptedAnswer.text: Okayama Korakuen Garden and Okayama Castle form a classic castle-and-garden walking route. Kibi Tsujinja Shrine offers deep insight into the Momotaro folklore. The Kurashiki Bikan Historical Quarter with its white-walled canal streets is perfect for a leisurely stroll. These places combine history and local life, making them ideal cultural refreshment stops before heading to San'in.

sanin.name: How to determine if purchasing a JR PASS is cost-effective for the Sanyo-San'in itinerary?

acceptedAnswer.text: Add up the prices of all necessary long-distance tickets; if the round-trip fare approaches the JR PASS price, buying the pass is usually worthwhile. Including extra spots like Kure and Onomichi increases the pass's value. It is recommended to choose between Sanyo, San'in, or Setouchi area passes based on your itinerary density.

sanin.name: Which season is best for walking and sightseeing in Sanyo and San'in?

acceptedAnswer.text: Spring cherry blossoms and autumn foliage offer comfortable weather and charming scenery, ideal for walking and appreciating cultural landscapes. Summer is bright but hot and humid, requiring sun protection and hydration. Winter has fewer crowds and light-up events but colder sea breezes. Choose based on your cold tolerance and travel plans.

055527a739dd.name: How to arrange transportation and itinerary for a Hokkaido illumination day tour (including Furano Fairy Terrace, Biei Blue Pond, etc.)?

055527a739dd.name: What are the recommended accommodations in Sapporo city and how to evaluate their transportation convenience?

If you prefer a lively shopping district, accommodations near Odori Station are a better choice, offering convenient shopping and transportation connections.

055527a739dd.name: How to use JR from New Chitose Airport to Sapporo Station and save time queuing for tickets?

You can use IC cards such as Kitaca, Suica, or PASMO to enter directly without queuing for tickets. The trains run frequently, making it convenient and fast, ideal for managing your schedule.

tax.name: What is the difference between the Citizen Digital Certificate and the Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate for tax filing, and how should I choose?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Citizen Digital Certificate is a physical chip card that requires a card reader, suitable for those who have the equipment at home and want to file taxes entirely online while supporting banking and financial services; the Mobile Citizen Digital Certificate is linked to a mobile app, convenient for users without a card reader and allows the entire tax filing process to be completed on the phone. Both can fully download income data and support subsequent financial verification. Choose based on your usage habits and available equipment.

tax.name: What should I do if I forget the PIN code of my Citizen Digital Certificate during tax filing, and how can I avoid locking the card?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you forget your PIN code, do not randomly try to avoid locking the card. You should reset or unlock it through the official MOICA process. It is recommended to change the default PIN immediately after receiving the card and keep your user code safe to reduce the risk of issues on tax filing day.

tax.name: If I don't have a card reader or physical card, what verification method should I use to quickly complete online tax filing?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you don't have a card reader or physical card, the fastest method is mobile phone verification. You only need a monthly subscription mobile number in your name, your ID number, and your National Health Insurance card number. Make sure to turn off Wi-Fi and enable mobile data. Identity verification for tax filing can be completed within about 5 minutes.

tax.name: How do I use the Citizen Digital Certificate's mobile NFC function for tax filing, and what should I pay attention to?

acceptedAnswer.text: To use mobile NFC sensing for the Citizen Digital Certificate, your phone must support NFC, the service side must support NFC card reading, and the card version must be compatible. When sensing, place the card flat against the back of the phone and slowly move it to find the sensing point. On iPhones, this is usually near the camera. Avoid moving the card midway to ensure successful verification.

tax.name: How can I keep track of the tax filing period and refund disbursement times to avoid missing deadlines?

acceptedAnswer.text: The filing period is from May 1 to June 1. It is recommended to complete filing three days in advance to avoid system congestion. Refunds are disbursed in three batches: the first batch is credited on July 31 and requires online filing and data submission before June 1; subsequent batches are on October 31 and January 20 of the following year. You can check refund progress on the Ministry of Finance’s tax portal.

35cc65327d28.name: How to Quickly Develop and Integrate Google Apps Script Projects Using AI Agent?

acceptedAnswer.text: By using AI Agent combined with the Clasp CLI tool to manage project source code, and through clear design commands and deployment processes, you can complete the design, development, and integration of Google Apps Script within a few hours, improving efficiency and ensuring correct functionality.

35cc65327d28.name: What Are the Technical Limitations of Google Apps Script When Integrating External APIs?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google Apps Script cannot customize the User-Agent, has a 6-minute execution limit per run and mainly operates synchronously blocking, experiences cold start delays, and Web Apps automatically redirect. These limitations need to be overcome through segmented execution, proxy services, or architectural adjustments.

35cc65327d28.name: What Are the Advantages of Google Apps Script Compared to Other FAAS Services?

acceptedAnswer.text: Google Apps Script is completely free and seamlessly integrates with Google’s built-in services, eliminating complex OAuth processes. It is suitable for rapid development and automating workflows within the Google ecosystem. Its drawbacks include more restrictions and unsuitability for heavy computation.

35cc65327d28.name: In Which Scenarios Is Google Apps Script Not Suitable for Development?

acceptedAnswer.text: Scenarios unsuitable for Google Apps Script include integrating non-Google ecosystem services, hybrid local and cloud architectures, complex or long-running computations, and large-scale web scraping or ticket-snatching programs. In these cases, more flexible or specialized tools are recommended.

35cc65327d28.name: How to Ensure the Security and Stability of Google Apps Script Projects Developed by AI Agent?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is recommended to store sensitive tokens in PropertiesService or the system Keychain, immediately regenerate and update tokens after use, and combine Jest unit testing with CI/CD workflows to ensure code quality and stability.
